title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Orochi, Oden as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
